context: Tests whether the agent can review a modern SwiftUI StoreKit 2 paywall and correct purchase, transaction, entitlement, restore, and verification mistakes.

checklist.name: Preferred purchase path
checklist.description: Uses StoreKit views or SwiftUI PurchaseAction for custom SwiftUI buttons, while allowing direct product.purchase(options:) for lower-level custom flows.

checklist.name: Launch transaction listener
checklist.description: Requires Transaction.updates to start at app launch and notes it catches Ask to Buy approvals, renewals, refunds, revocations, Family Sharing changes, purchases from other devices, and unfinished transactions.

checklist.name: Verification and finish order
checklist.description: Verifies VerificationResult before granting access and calls transaction.finish() only after delivering content or enabling the entitlement.

checklist.name: Entitlement scope
checklist.description: Explains that Transaction.currentEntitlements covers non-consumables, active or grace-period auto-renewable subscriptions, and non-renewing subscriptions, but not consumable delivery history.

checklist.name: Pending and restore handling
checklist.description: Handles pending and user-cancelled purchase results without unlocking content and provides a visible restore path and subscription policy links.

checklist.name: Revocation handling
checklist.description: Excludes refunded or revoked transactions from active entitlement state and updates entitlement state when refunds or revocations arrive.
